arts.ttl: Premier League to send clubs updated APT rule change proposals after Man City challenge
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Jamie Gardner PA Chief Sports Reporter, Bruna Reis)
arts.sum: Premier League clubs will be sent updated APT rule change proposals after the conclusion of the arbitration and the outcome of the Man City legal challenge was made public.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Zinchenko makes shock Man City allegation
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has claimed that Manchester City kept him on an academy deal until he had made 43 senior appearances for the club. "The City lawyers said: 'Look, this is an academy player contract, right?

arts.ttl: Man City fans aim unsubtle dig at Premier League CEO Richard Masters as legal war rumbles on... amid 'feisty' emergency meeting between top flight clubs over sponsorship rules
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: An emergency summit was held on Tuesday afternoon to try and find peace in City's battle with the top-flight over sponsorship rules.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs set Pedro Porro asking price amid Man City interest?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly demanding £80m for right-back Pedro Porro following interest from Manchester City for the services of the Spanish defender.
